sentences.arabic: جَاءَ مُفَتِّشٌ إِلَى الْمَكْتَبِ لِفَحْصِ الْأَوْرَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Inspektor je došao u kancelariju da pregleda papire.
sentences.translationEn: An inspector came to the office to check the papers.

sentences.arabic: أَعَدَّتْ رَنَا كُلَّ الْوَثَائِقِ قَبْلَ وُصُولِهِ.
sentences.translation: Rana je pripremila sve dokumente prije njegovog dolaska.
sentences.translationEn: Rana prepared all the documents before his arrival.

sentences.arabic: فَحَصَ الْمُفَتِّشُ الْأَوْرَاقَ وَلَمْ يَجِدْ أَيَّ مُشْكِلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Inspektor je pregledao papire i nije pronašao nikakav problem.
sentences.translationEn: The inspector checked the papers and found no problem.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ رَنَا عَلَى تَنْظِيمِهَا الْجَيِّدِ وَغَادَرَ.
sentences.translation: Zahvalio je Rani na dobroj organizaciji i otišao.
sentences.translationEn: He thanked Rana for her good organisation and left.
